rationale: Both correctly identify PR #4792 as the already-merged fix folded into the v0.24 rebase, matching the ground-truth thread. X is more tightly grounded: it quotes the actual code comment from the ground-truth diff near-verbatim, cites precise file:line locations across the coordinator/scheduler/runner files, correctly distinguishes the AR-runner's pooler_inter/pooler_client naming from the generation-runner's inter_stage_outputs naming, and proactively addresses red herrings in the reporter's log (NVFP4 patch, timeout value change). Y's diagnosis is essentially the same but its 'Verification' section asserts a specific unit test exists in PR #4792 even though Y's own internal diagnostics admit a grep found no such test — presenting an unverified/likely-fabricated detail as fact undermines its grounding and completeness.
